name: Larry Tidwell
bio: Larry Tidwell serves as the Mayor of Jefferson, the county seat of Marion County and one of the most historic towns in East Texas. Jefferson was once the largest inland port in Texas and is now a popular tourist destination known for its antebellum homes, bed-and-breakfasts, and haunted history tours. The mayor works to preserve the city's heritage while promoting tourism-driven economic growth.
campaignPromises: Preserve Jefferson's historic architecture and character
Promote tourism as the city's primary economic driver
Support local businesses and bed-and-breakfast industry
Maintain city services within a responsible budget
